title: Italian Creamy Irish Parfait
description: A delightful Italian dessert featuring creamy yogurt, crunchy almonds, and sweet parfait layers.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix vanilla extract with granulated sugar (if using)
Layer parfait, yogurt, and almonds in a serving glass or parfait dish
Repeat the layering process until all ingredients are used, ending with a layer of yogurt on top
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld
Serve chilled and garnish with additional almonds if desired
